rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Elec. Code §278.007, which governs voter information guide availability for judicial elections. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 278.007. AVAILABILITY OF GUIDE. If the secretary of state implements a voter information service program, the secretary may make the voter information guide available to the public on the Internet not later than the 45th day before the date of each judicial election.
_note: No conflict; provisions address entirely different subject matters.
